name: affordant-monorepo
description: Affordance-first hypermedia (HATEOAS) toolkit: shared wire contract, vanilla client, server-side envelope builder, and framework adapters.
author: Florian Leroy

scripts.build: npm run build -w @affordant/contract && npm run build -w affordant && npm run build -w effect-react-bridge && npm run build -w @affordant/effect && npm run build -w @affordant/react && npm run build -w @affordant/server && npm run build -w @affordant/express
scripts.typecheck: npm run build && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
